LanguageData.RimMind.BridgeRimChat.Settings.EnableDia: When RimChat is present, skip RimMind-Dialogue's player dialogue entry to avoid duplicate chat interfaces
LanguageData.RimMind.BridgeRimChat.Settings.SkipPlaye: When RimChat is present, skip RimMind's player dialogue triggers and remove the "Chat with X" float menu option
LanguageData.RimMind.BridgeRimChat.Settings.ForceRimM: Keep RimMind's player dialogue triggers and float menu option even when skipping, allowing both chat systems to coexist
LanguageData.RimMind.BridgeRimChat.Settings.EnableAct: When RimChat is present, skip RimMind-Actions and Storyteller incidents that overlap with RimChat's capabilities to avoid duplicate execution
LanguageData.RimMind.BridgeRimChat.Settings.SkipDiplo: Skip adjust_faction and trigger_incident actions, handled by RimChat's diplomacy system
LanguageData.RimMind.BridgeRimChat.Settings.SkipTrigg: Skip RimMind-Storyteller incident triggers to avoid duplicate event firing with RimChat
LanguageData.RimMind.BridgeRimChat.Settings.SkipRecru: Skip recruit_agree action, let RimChat handle recruitment decisions
LanguageData.RimMind.BridgeRimChat.Settings.IncidentC: Minimum cooldown between two Storyteller incident triggers, preventing repeated events in a short time.
LanguageData.RimMind.BridgeRimChat.Settings.ForceRimM: Force RimMind to execute all actions
Ignore mutual exclusion rules, RimMind-Actions executes all actions regardless of RimChat status (does not affect Storyteller incidents)
LanguageData.RimMind.BridgeRimChat.Settings.EnableCon: Pull dialogue history and other data from RimChat, registering as RimMind context providers so RimMind can perceive RimChat's conversations
LanguageData.RimMind.BridgeRimChat.Settings.PullDiplo: Register RimChat's diplomacy dialogue history as RimMind's static context provider
LanguageData.RimMind.BridgeRimChat.Settings.PullRpgHi: Register RimChat's RPG dialogue history as RimMind's pawn context provider
